$schema-note: Registry of external reference-doc sources for fetch_reference.py. Add a new object to `sources` to track another site - no code change needed. A source discovers URLs one of two ways: `sitemap` (+ include/exclude regexes over the <loc> entries) or an explicit `urls` list. Fetching is incremental via conditional GET (ETag / Last-Modified) tracked in each source's manifest.json.
